description: Current DS-canonical raw Stage Execution Quality components and source checkpoint per stage.
sql: SELECT CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS fleet_name, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS pad_name, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS name, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num_td, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS formula_version, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS source_signature, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS platinum_rows, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS bronze_rows, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS anomaly_source_signature, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS first_source_ts, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS last_source_ts, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS latest_source_updated_at, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS anomaly_count, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS substages_present, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS design_seconds, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS design_minutes, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS raw_a, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS raw_b, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS raw_c, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS cv_rate, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS cv_press, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS longest_run_frac, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS dip_rate_d, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS design_rate_d, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS processing_run_id, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS computed_at FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 WHERE 1 = 0
